docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIQUEIROS, EDUARDO $1,665.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,780.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY YESENIA TAFOLA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SIQUEIROS, EDUARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-19-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT EDUARDO SIQUIEROS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SIQUEIROS, EDUARDO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00) SERVED MAR-12-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SIQUEIROS, EDUARDO
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
